% ------------------------------------------------------------------------
% file `travail_de_vacances-exercise-2-solution-body.tex'
%   in folder `xsim/'
%
%     solution of type `exercise' with id `2'
%
% generated by the `solution' environment of the
%   `xsim' package v0.21 (2022/02/12)
% from source `travail_de_vacances' on 2022/06/28 on line 38
% ------------------------------------------------------------------------
    \begin{tasks}(2)
        \task
        $\begin{WithArrows}
                3x-8  & = 12x+2
                \Arrow{-12x}\\
                -9x-8 & = 2
                \Arrow{$+8$}\\
                -9x   & = 10
                \Arrow{$\div (-9)$}\\
                x     & = -\dfrac{10}{9}
            \end{WithArrows}$
        \task
        $\begin{WithArrows}
                -2x+8 &= 2x
                \Arrow{$+2x$}\\
                8 &= 4x
                \Arrow{$\div 4$}\\
                2 &= x
            \end{WithArrows}$
        \task*
        $\begin{WithArrows}
                4x-10(x+10)&=7x-10-4x+4
                \Arrow[jump=2]{Réduire chaque membre}\\
                4x-10x-100 &= 3x -6\\
                -6x -100 &= 3x-6
                \Arrow{$-3x$}\\
                -9x -100 &= -6
                \Arrow{$+100$}\\
                -9x &= 94
                \Arrow{$\div (-9)$}\\
                x &= -\dfrac{94}{9}
            \end{WithArrows}$
        \task*
        $\begin{WithArrows}
                x-3(x-3)+6 &=x-8(x+5)
                \Arrow[jump=2]{Réduire chaque membre}\\
                x-3x+9+6 &= x-8x-40\\
                -2x + 15 &= -7x -40
                \Arrow{$+7x$}\\
                5x + 15 &= -40
                \Arrow{$-15$}\\
                5x &= -55
                \Arrow{$\div 5$}\\
                x &= -11
            \end{WithArrows}$
        \task*
        $\begin{WithArrows}
                -9 x-14     &=-2 (x-4)+7 x-4
                \Arrow[jump=2]{Réduire le membre de droite}\\
                -9x -14     &= -2x + 8 + 7x -4\\
                -9x -14     &= 5x + 4
                \Arrow{$-5x$}\\
                -14x - 14   &= 4
                \Arrow{$+14$}\\
                -14x        &= 18
                \Arrow{$\div -14$}\\
                x           &= -\dfrac{18}{14}
                \Arrow{Simplifier}\\
                x           &= -\dfrac{9}{7}
            \end{WithArrows}$
        \task*
        $\begin{WithArrows}
                -8(x-6) + 8 x - 6   &= 6x - 3(x+1) - 3
                \Arrow{Réduire les deux membres}\\
                -8x + 48 + 8x - 6   &= 6x - 3x - 3 - 3\\
                42                  &= 3x - 6
                \Arrow{$+6$}\\
                48                  &= 3x
                \Arrow{$\div 3$}\\
                16                  &= x
            \end{WithArrows}$
        \task*
        $\begin{WithArrows}
                7(x-7) - 10x - 3    &= 8x + 5
                \Arrow[jump=2]{Réduire le membre de gauche}\\
                7x - 49 - 10x - 3   &= 8x + 5\\
                -3x - 52            &= 8x + 5
                \Arrow{$-8x$}\\
                -11x - 52           &= 5
                \Arrow{$+52$}\\
                -11x                &= 57
                \Arrow{$\div (-11)$}\\
                x                   &= -\dfrac{57}{11}
            \end{WithArrows}$
        \task*
        $\begin{WithArrows}
                \dfrac{8x}{3} + \dfrac{1}{4} + 2x &= \dfrac{11x}{6} - 9
                \Arrow{Mettre tous les termes au même dénominateur}\\
                \dfrac{32x}{12} + \dfrac{3}{12} + \dfrac{24x}{12}
                &= \dfrac{22x}{12} - \dfrac{108}{12}
                \Arrow{$\cdot 12$}\\
                32x + 3 + 24x &= 22x - 108
                \Arrow{Réduire le terme de gauche}\\
                56x + 3 &= 22x - 108
                \Arrow{$-22x$}\\
                34x + 3 &= -108
                \Arrow{$-3$}\\
                34x &= -111
                \Arrow{$\div 34$}\\
                x &= -\dfrac{111}{34}
            \end{WithArrows}$
        \task*
        $\begin{WithArrows}
                -3x + \dfrac{1}{4} &=7x + \dfrac{x}{6}
                \Arrow{Mettre tous les termes au même dénominateur}\\
                -\dfrac{36x}{12} + \dfrac{3}{12}
                &= \dfrac{84x}{12} + \dfrac{2x}{12}
                \Arrow{$\cdot 12$}\\
                -36x + 3 &= 84x + 2x
                \Arrow{Réduire le membre de droite}\\
                -36x + 3 &= 86x
                \Arrow{$+36x$}\\
                3 &= 122x
                \Arrow{$\div 122$}\\
                \dfrac{3}{122} &= x
            \end{WithArrows}$
        \task*
        $\begin{WithArrows}
                \dfrac{1}{4}(-2 x+3) + 5x &= -\dfrac{10x}{3} + 5
                \Arrow{Mettre tous les termes au même dénominateur}\\
                \dfrac{3}{12}(-2 x+3) + \dfrac{60x}{12}
                &= -\dfrac{40x}{12} + \dfrac{60}{12}
                \Arrow{$\cdot 12$}\\
                3(-2x+3) + 60x &= -40x + 60
                \Arrow{Réduire le membre de gauche}\\
                -6x + 9 + 60x &= -40x + 60\\
                54x + 9 &= -40x + 60
                \Arrow{$+40x$}\\
                94x + 9 &= 60
                \Arrow{$-9$}\\
                94x &= 51
                \Arrow{$\div 94$}\\
                x &= \dfrac{54}{91}
            \end{WithArrows}$
    \end{tasks}
